title: Section 6
content: No suit, prosecution or other legal proceedings shall be instituted except with the previous sanction of the1 [Central Government] against any person in respect of anything done or purporting to be done in exercise of the powers conferred by sections 4 and 5.
footnote: 1 Subs. by President Act 2 of 1989, s. 2, for "State Government" (w.e.f. 3-4-1989).
